member.name: T:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute
member.summary: Configures action-level manifest properties for a plugin action class. Controllers (Keypad, Encoder) are derived automatically from the implemented interfaces and do not need to be specified here.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.Name
member.summary: Display name of the action shown in Stream Deck. Defaults to the class name.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.Tooltip
member.summary: Tooltip shown when hovering over the action in Stream Deck.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.Icon
member.summary: Path to the action icon (without extension). Defaults to "Images/pluginIcon".

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.PropertyInspectorPath
member.summary: Path to the property inspector HTML file. Defaults to "PropertyInspector/{ClassName}.html", which matches the file generated by .

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.SupportURL
member.summary: URL for the action's support page.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.SupportedInMultiActions
member.summary: Whether the action can be used in multi-actions. When not specified, Stream Deck assumes true.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.SupportedInKeyLogicActions
member.summary: Whether the action can be used in key logic actions. When not specified, Stream Deck assumes true.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.DisableAutomaticStates
member.summary: Disables automatic state management for this action. When not specified, Stream Deck assumes false.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.DisableCaching
member.summary: Disables image caching for this action. When not specified, Stream Deck assumes false.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.UserTitleEnabled
member.summary: Whether the user can set a custom title for this action. When not specified, Stream Deck assumes true.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckActionAttribute.VisibleInActionsList
member.summary: Whether the action appears in the Stream Deck action list. When not specified, Stream Deck assumes true.

member.name: T:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckPluginAttribute
member.summary: Configures plugin-level manifest properties. Values set here override MSBuild properties but are overridden by . Apply to the assembly ([assembly: StreamDeckPlugin(...)]) or to any class in the project.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckPluginAttribute.Name
member.summary: Display name of the plugin shown in Stream Deck.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckPluginAttribute.UUID
member.summary: Plugin UUID in reverse-domain format (e.g. "com.mycompany.myplugin"). Defaults to the lowercase assembly name.

member.summary: Path to the category icon (without extension).

member.summary: Path to the plugin icon (without extension).

member.summary: URL for the plugin's support page.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Attributes.StreamDeckPluginAttribute.MacMinVersion

member.name: M:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.ISettingsPopulatable.PopulateFromJson(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Merges property values from a into this settings instance. Only properties present in the JSON object are updated; all others are left unchanged.
member.param: The JSON object containing the values to merge.
member.returns: The number of properties successfully populated.

member.name: T:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestConfigBase
member.summary: Base class for providing manifest configuration that cannot be derived from code or MSBuild properties. Subclass this in your plugin project to supply default states, encoder configuration, application monitoring, and profile settings. Values from this class take highest priority — they override both [StreamDeckPlugin]/[StreamDeckAction] attributes and MSBuild properties.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestConfigBase.DefaultStates
member.summary: Default states applied to all actions that do not define their own. Returns null to use the generator's built-in default (a single state with Image = "Images/pluginAction").

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestConfigBase.DefaultEncoder
member.summary: Default encoder configuration applied to all encoder actions. Returns null to omit encoder configuration.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestConfigBase.ApplicationsToMonitor
member.summary: Applications whose launch/termination the plugin wants to be notified about. Returns null to omit ApplicationsToMonitor from the manifest.

member.name: P:Cmpnnt.StreamDeckToolkit.Manifest.ManifestConfigBase.Profiles
member.summary: Stream Deck profiles to install with the plugin. Returns null to omit Profiles from the manifest.
